subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! I testify that thou hast forsaken thy homeland for the love of God, the Lord of the hidden and the manifest, and hast turned thyself towards the Dayspring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی اشهد انک ترکت الوطن حبا لله مالک السر و العلن و اقبلت الی مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @presence of; reunion with God, @praise and encouragement
